items.name: Smili's Diamond and Golden Chain of Bling
items.description:
Where's my chain? That's my bling. Always drama when I ring.
The final exclusive item for Golden Pouch, Diamond Pouch and Misprint Anti-Smili owners.
If all the stock doesn't sell within a month, I'll give the remaining stock to Schmunguglsu Membership Card owners!
Model by Amm.
Based on Smili from the Smili comic!

Essentially, whatever you see, can be instantly uploaded to your team leader, or command element with a push of a button.
